Firebase — Real-time Sync
Not connected — local only
Steps:
1. console.firebase.google.com → New project
2. Firestore Database → Test mode → Region: asia-south1
3. Project Settings → Web App → Copy firebaseConfig
4. Paste below and click Connect
Deploy to Netlify
1. Go to app.netlify.com/drop
2. Drag & drop this HTML file
3. Share the URL with all staff
4. Bookmark on each device
5. Install as app via browser menu
